qa_pair.question: Show me the last failed pipelines on master in our project.
How healthy is the nightly schedule on master over the past 7 and 30 days?
Pipeline 12345 is still running — check its current status.
Which specific job failed in pipeline 12345?
Show me the last 200 lines of the log for job 98765.
Kick off a new pipeline on master with DEBUG=1.
Retry the failed jobs in pipeline 12345.
Cancel pipeline 12345, it's stuck.
What CI/CD schedules are configured and are they all active?
Delete the broken schedule with ID 42.
Add a new schedule that runs the build every night at 02:00 Europe/Berlin.
List every open merge request in the project.
Show me the description and branches of merge request !42.
What files did merge request !42 change, with diffs?
Open a merge request from feature/login into master with title "feat: login".
Merge MR !42 into master.
Show me the contents of .gitlab-ci.yml on master.
List all files under src/ on the release-1.2 branch.
What commits are on release/1.5 that aren't on master?
Give me the project ID, visibility, and default branch of this repo.
Show me branches that have "release" in their name.
What was the most recently shipped version tag?
